title: dendrobium flabellum
intro: Dendrobium flabellum, also known as the fan-leaved dendrobium, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The plant has been traditionally used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, which are believed to offer health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health and enhanced immune function. Dendrobium flabellum has also been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including coughs, colds, and sore throats.
